metrolink: On Thursday 11th and Friday 12th June The Weeknd plays at Etihad Stadium. Services will be busier than usual so please plan your journey in advance.
headlines: Holy git! Microsoft code-sharing site suffers downtime, despite move to Azure
MX Linux 25.2 provides possible refuge from AI as well as systemd
Fired IT worker jailed for 21 months after sabotaging old school district
KPMG's AI report becomes an accidental demo of AI hallucinations
crew_quote: "With this weather, I could really go for a curry — though I might just end up with a side of Azure Downtime on the menu instead!"
